title: Godfather Mendoza
director: Juan Bustillo Oro, Fernando de Fuentes
writer: Juan Bustillo Oro, Mauricio Magdaleno, Fernando de Fuentes
actors: Alfredo del Diestro, Carmen Guerrero, Antonio R. Frausto
plot: During Mexican Revolution, Rosalio Mendoza (Del Diestro) survives by making and winning favors from both factions, the governmental forces and Zapata's Army. His hacienda welcomes everybody, and Mendoza is considered a good friend...
